title: aws-ssm: SSM 4096-byte limit violation maps to Unavailable (should be Backend)
description: Trigger: caller passes SecretValue whose UTF-8 representation exceeds 4096 bytes (SSM SecureString limit). AWS returns ValidationException which falls through to SecretError::Unavailable (transient). This is a permanent error, not transient. Wrong variant causes unnecessary retry churn. Fix: detect the SSM size ValidationException and map to SecretError::Backend.
